mapper.insert: INSERT INTO poi (name, type, longitude, latitude, description, opening_hours, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{description}, #{openingHours}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE poi SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, description = #{description}, opening_hours = #{openingHours}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
